\tzpentry{ID5564}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5564 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{ij} = K_0 \frac{m_j}{M_\odot} \frac{\exp\!\big(-|a_i-a_j|/L\big)}{|a_i-a_j|+\varepsilon}, \end{equation}
